PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi, via ZOOM, counsel for Verna Shaheen, Personal Representative.

The court begins by querying counsel regarding the status of the real property and whether she anticipates obtaining waivers of accounting. Counsel reports that there have been several issues regarding selling the real property including protected tenants and the real estate office hired to list and sell the property have not been unable to enter the property due to pandemic related restrictions. But counsel believes that those restrictions may be lifted soon. The property had previously been on the market for some time but had no offers even with work to the exterior and gardening. Counsel also reports that she doesn't anticipate obtaining waivers of accounting but believes that an accounting would be appropriate.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Status Petition is taken under submission with the intent to grant. The court also sets a status date for the filing of an Accounting or Waivers of Accounting for October 20, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-19-2021 Continued To Jun-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to MAR-22-2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Probate Examiner assigned to this matter is to contact counsel to advise of new date.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods/Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
